notes: A synthetic Form 20-F cover page for PanAmerica Resources Corp. where every label and section title appears in both English and Spanish (bilingual parallel text, not translation — both appear on the same line or adjacent lines). Tests that interleaved dual-language text does not cause field value duplication or extraction confusion. The registrant name, form type, and period date appear in both languages simultaneously. Positive-assertion case: filer_name (PanAmerica Resources Corp.), form_type (20-F), filing_date (2026-03-30), and period_fiscal_year_end (2025-12-31) should be extractable despite the bilingual label noise.
